global_description: A small, slender songbird with a streamlined body and a subtle grayish-brown plumage. It features a slightly crested head, a short, thin bill, and a pale underbelly. The wings and tail are darker with faint wing bars.

part_details.head: Slightly crested, grayish-brown with a subtle contrast to the body.
part_details.bill: Short, thin, and dark, suited for catching insects.
part_details.wings: Darker grayish-brown with faint wing bars, long and pointed.
part_details.tail: Medium length, darker than the body, slightly notched.
part_details.underbelly: Pale gray, providing contrast to the darker upper parts.

spatial_relations: The slightly crested head transitions smoothly into the streamlined body.
The short bill is positioned at the front of the head.
The wings extend along the sides of the body, ending near the tail.
The tail is aligned with the body, extending from the rear.
